| `font.family.text` | `--zen-font-family-text` | `Roboto` |
| `font.family.mono` | `--zen-font-family-mono` | `Roboto Mono` |
| `font.family.brand` | `--zen-font-family-brand` | `AllRpungGothic` |

## FontWeight Tokens

| Token | CSS Variable | Value |
|-------|--------------|-------|
| `font.weight.regular` | `--zen-font-weight-regular` | `400` |
| `font.weight.medium` | `--zen-font-weight-medium` | `500` |
| `font.weight.semibold` | `--zen-font-weight-semibold` | `600` |
| `font.weight.bold` | `--zen-font-weight-bold` | `700` |

## Shadow Tokens

| Token | CSS Variable | Value |
|-------|--------------|-------|
| `shadow.xs` | `--zen-shadow-xs` | `0px 1px 3px 1px rgba(0, 0, 15, 0.06), 0px 1px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 18, 0.07)` |
| `shadow.sm` | `--zen-shadow-sm` | `0px 1px 7px 3px rgba(0, 0, 20, 0.08), 0px 1px 3px 1px rgba(0, 0, 31, 0.12)` |
| `shadow.md` | `--zen-shadow-md` | `0px 1px 3px 0px rgba(0, 0, 77, 0.3), 0px 4px 8px 3px rgba(0, 0, 38, 0.15)` |
| `shadow.lg` | `--zen-shadow-lg` | `0px 6px 10px 4px rgba(0, 0, 38, 0.15), 0px 2px 3px 0px rgba(0, 0, 77, 0.3)` |
| `shadow.xl` | `--zen-shadow-xl` | `0px 8px 12px 6px rgba(0, 0, 38, 0.15), 0px 4px 4px 0px rgba(0, 0, 77, 0.3)` |

## String Tokens

| Token | CSS Variable | Value |
|-------|--------------|-------|
| `motion.ease.entrance` | `--zen-motion-ease-entrance` | `ease-out` |
| `motion.ease.exit` | `--zen-motion-ease-exit` | `ease-in` |
| `motion.ease.standard` | `--zen-motion-ease-standard` | `ease-in-out` |

## Typography Tokens

| Token | CSS Variable | Value |
|-------|--------------|-------|
| `font.text-styles.heading-display` | `--zen-font-text-styles-heading-display` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.semibold}","fontSize":"{font.size.3xl}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.normal}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.2xl}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.heading-prominent` | `--zen-font-text-styles-heading-prominent` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.semibold}","fontSize":"{font.size.xl}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.normal}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.xl}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.heading-standard` | `--zen-font-text-styles-heading-standard` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.semibold}","fontSize":"{font.size.lg}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.wide.1}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.lg}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.heading-subtle` | `--zen-font-text-styles-heading-subtle` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.semibold}","fontSize":"{font.size.md}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.wide.2}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.md}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.heading-micro` | `--zen-font-text-styles-heading-micro` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.semibold}","fontSize":"{font.size.sm}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.wide.3}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.sm}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.body-display` | `--zen-font-text-styles-body-display` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.regular}","fontSize":"{font.size.xl}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.wide.1}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.lg}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.body-prominent` | `--zen-font-text-styles-body-prominent` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.regular}","fontSize":"{font.size.lg}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.wide.1}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.lg}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.body-standard` | `--zen-font-text-styles-body-standard` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.regular}","fontSize":"{font.size.md}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.wide.2}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.md}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.body-subtle` | `--zen-font-text-styles-body-subtle` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.regular}","fontSize":"{font.size.sm}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.wide.3}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.sm}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.body-micro` | `--zen-font-text-styles-body-micro` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.regular}","fontSize":"{font.size.xs}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.wide.4}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.xs}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.label-standard` | `--zen-font-text-styles-label-standard` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.medium}","fontSize":"{font.size.md}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.wide.2}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.md}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.label-subtle` | `--zen-font-text-styles-label-subtle` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.medium}","fontSize":"{font.size.sm}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.wide.3}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.sm}"}` |
| `font.text-styles.label-micro` | `--zen-font-text-styles-label-micro` | `{"fontWeight":"{font.weight.medium}","fontSize":"{font.size.xs}","letterSpacing":"{font.letterspacing.wide.4}","lineHeight":"{font.lineheight.xs}"}` |
